Product Specifications:

Basic information

Product Type:Single Box Product

Product Name:Kids Vanity Table with Mirror and Chair, Wooden Children's Dressing Makeup Desk with Storage Shelves, Study and Activity Table for Girls and Boys, Playroom Bedroom Furniture - White

Origin:China

Color:White

Material:MDF

Product size

Package size

Length (inches):31.50

Product features:

  •  2-Piece Vanity SetIncludes a kid-sized vanity table and matching chair, creating a perfect space for dressing up, studying, drawing, and imaginative play.
  •  Safe & Shatter-Resistant MirrorFeatures a cloud-shaped acrylic mirror that is smooth, durable, and safer than glass—ideal for young children’s daily use.
  •  Built-In Storage ShelvesOpen side shelves provide convenient space for books, toys, accessories, and art supplies, helping kids keep their room neat and organized.
  •  Sturdy Wooden Construction Made from strong, child-safe wood with rounded edges and a stable structure, offering reliable support and long-lasting use.
  •  Adorable Modern DesignThe charming white finish and playful shape blend beautifully into nurseries, bedrooms, and playrooms, making it a cute and functional furniture piece kids will love.
  • Designed to hold up to 66–110 lbs (30–50 kg), this unit provides stable and reliable support for everyday use, keeping your items secure and well-organized.
